zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Empson於大約1570年出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，她的父親Thomas Empson11568歲，母親Amy Amptyll23歲。她於1590年5月4日與Wolstone Childe在英國巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年6月26日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特享年47歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Empson于大约1570年出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲Thomas Empson11568岁，母亲Amy Amptyll23岁。她于1590年5月4日与Wolstone Childe在英国巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年6月26日在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特享年47岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Empson was born about 1570, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, her father, Thomas Empson, was 11568 and her mother, Amy Amptyll, was 23. She married Wolstone Childe on 4 May 1590, in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 June 1616, in Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Empson est née environ 1570, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Empson, avait 11568 ans et sa mère, Amy Amptyll, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Wolstone Childe le 4 mai 1590, à Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1616, à Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Middlesex, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Empson è nata il circa 1570 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Thomas Empson, aveva 11568 anni e sua madre, Amy Amptyll, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Wolstone Childe il 4 maggio 1590, nel Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1616, nel Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Empsonが約1570年にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Empsonは11568歳，母Amy Amptyllは23歳であった。1590年5月4日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペターでWolstone Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年6月26日にイギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ ウィソウト アルドガトで47歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン サイント ボトルフ ウィソウト アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트
ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Empson(이)가 대략 1570년 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Empson(은)는 11568세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amy Amptyll(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1590년 5월 4일 영국 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 피터에서 Wolstone Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Empson nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Empson, tinha 11568 anos e sua mãe, Amy Amptyll, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Wolstone Childe em 4 de maio de 1590, em Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de junho de 1616, em Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Mi: лондон сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.St Botolph Without-Aldgate, London, Midd: сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Saint Margaret's Church, Westminster, Lo: сеинт маргарет, викторя, Тринидад и Тобаго, бритиш вест индиесь
ru.London St Helen Bishopsgate, Middlesex,: лондон ст хелен бишопсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Empson родилась около 1570 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Empson было 11568 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy Amptyll, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wolstone Childe 4 мая 1590 г. в местности халфонт ст питир, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 июня 1616 г. в местности сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Empson nació aproximadamente 1570, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Empson, tenía 11568 años y su mamá, Amy Amptyll, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Wolstone Childe el 4 de mayo de 1590, en Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1616, en Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en London Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
